Notes: Single UPDATE adds a CNAME and an A RR at the same owner name with no prerequisites; follow-up queries check which RRset(s) survive.

Steps.Description: Add CNAME and A at alias.campus.edu. in the same UPDATE message.

Steps.Name: alias.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the CNAME RRset is present after the UPDATE.

Steps.Name: alias.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the A RRset is present after the UPDATE.
